ddls:
CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance profile */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being profiled */,
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the routine being profiled */,
  "time_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total time spent in the routine */,
  "exclusive_time" REAL /* Exclusive time spent in the routine (in seconds) */,
  "inclusive_time" REAL /* Inclusive time spent in the routine (in seconds) */,
  "call_count" INTEGER /* Number of calls to the routine */,
  "subroutine_count" REAL /* Number of subroutine calls */,
  "profile_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was created */,
  "profile_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the profiling session */,
  "profile_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the profiling session */,
  "profile_status" TEXT /* Status of the profile (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profiles_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profiles_routine_id FOREIGN KEY ("routine_id") REFERENCES routines ("routine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the software application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment in which the application is running */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the application was updated */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the application */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "hardware_config" TEXT /* Hardware configuration of the environment */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "network_config" TEXT /* Network configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the environment was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the environment was updated */,
  "environment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routines" (
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each routine */,
  "routine_name" TEXT /* Name of the routine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the routine */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application containing the routine */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the routine was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the routine was updated */,
  "routine_status" TEXT /* Status of the routine (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the routine (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("routine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routines_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subroutines" (
  "subroutine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subroutine */,
  "subroutine_name" TEXT /* Name of the subroutine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subroutine */,
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the routine containing the subroutine */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the subroutine was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the subroutine was updated */,
  "subroutine_status" TEXT /* Status of the subroutine (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the subroutine (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subroutine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subroutines_routine_id FOREIGN KEY ("routine_id") REFERENCES routines ("routine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routine_subroutine_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the routine */,
  "subroutine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subroutine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routine_subroutine_mapping_routine_id FOREIGN KEY ("routine_id") REFERENCES routines ("routine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routine_subroutine_mapping_subroutine_id FOREIGN KEY ("subroutine_id") REFERENCES subroutines ("subroutine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance target */,
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the routine */,
  "target_percentage" REAL /* Target percentage of total time */,
  "target_time" REAL /* Target time in seconds */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the target was set */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the target was updated */,
  "target_status" TEXT /* Status of the target (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_targets_routine_id FOREIGN KEY ("routine_id") REFERENCES routines ("routine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance profile */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the report was updated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the user's information was updated */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance profile */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES performance_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
